tools.name: lookup_company_website
tools.description: Find the best website URL for a company name. Uses Potarix Enricher API credits.

tools.name: find_person_email
tools.description: Find a verified email for a named person at a company or domain. Uses Potarix Enricher API credits.

tools.name: find_decision_maker_email
tools.description: Find a likely decision maker and verified email for a domain. Uses Potarix Enricher API credits.

tools.name: find_linkedin_email
tools.description: Find a verified email from a LinkedIn profile URL. Uses Potarix Enricher API credits.

tools.name: find_company_emails
tools.description: Find public company email contacts for a domain. Uses Potarix Enricher API credits.

tools.name: find_all
tools.description: Kitchen-sink: resolve a company's website, find decision-maker emails for the categories you request, and pull the company-wide email roster — all in one call. Pricing is the sum of underlying sub-calls; see /find-all docs. Uses Potarix Enricher API credits.

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Show the calling key's profile: email, credits remaining, total purchased, whether a card is on file, and how many active API keys exist. Free — does not consume credits.

tools.name: topup_credits
tools.description: Buy a credit pack. Charges the saved card off-session if one is on file (returns immediately on success). If no card is saved yet, run `start_checkout` first to capture one.

tools.name: start_checkout
tools.description: Return a Stripe Checkout URL the human clicks once to add a card. After the human completes checkout, future `topup_credits` calls are silent off-session charges. Hand the returned `url` to the user, do not try to follow it yourself.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: check_balance · Private data: find_company_emails, check_balance, topup_credits · Public sink: find_person_email, find_decision_maker_email, find_linkedin_email, find_company_emails, find_all, check_balance · Destructive: topup_credits.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: check_balance · Private data: find_company_emails, check_balance, topup_credits · Public sink: find_person_email, find_decision_maker_email, find_linkedin_email, find_company_emails, find_all, check_balance · Destructive: topup_credits

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
